1100001100000111 0100011110110101 0 -> sum: 0000101010111100, cout: 1
0101000000101100 0111001001001011 1 -> sum: 1100001001111000, cout: 0
0011011100110010 0111110010100100 0 -> sum: 1011001111010110, cout: 0
0011011101011100 0011101100101101 0 -> sum: 0111001010001001, cout: 0
0011101000001001 0000101001001101 0 -> sum: 0100010001010110, cout: 0
1010001100111101 1001001011010001 0 -> sum: 0011011000001110, cout: 1
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
